name: Dark Seer
description: If your enemy is equal, prepare for him. If greater, elude him. If weaker, crush him. Ish'Kafel, the Dark Seer Raises a wall of light that slows and creates replicas of any enemy hero who crosses it. These replicas serve at the Dark Seer's will, they last until destroyed or until the wall duration ends.

abilities.name: Quick Wit
abilities.description: Grants self flat bonus attack speed per current. Both the max health as heal and max mana as mana restore is non-functional for created.

abilities.name: Vacuum
abilities.description: Creates a vacuum within the area-targeted location that sucks in all enemy units within the radius, interrupting and dealing damage.

abilities.name: Ion Shell
abilities.description: Surrounds the target unit with a bristling shield that damages enemy units in an area around it.

abilities.name: Surge
abilities.description: The charged-up allied unit leave behind a trail that damages and slows enemy units around it. Does not create the Surge trail with Alt-Cast toggled on.

abilities.name: Normal Punch
abilities.description: The next attack on an enemy hero has True Strike, damages, and stuns based on Dark Seer's recently moved distance. The punch knocks a replica of the affected enemy hero that deals additional damage and receives additional incoming damage.

abilities.name: Wall of Replica
abilities.description: These replicas deals additional damage and also receives additional incoming damage. The Dark Seer, while unable to return to his natural realm, can channel part of the prismatic wall with powerful strength of mind, sowing confusion amongst enemy ranks.
